rules.description: Azure App Service on Azure Arc-enabled Kubernetes is retiring. Installation of the Application Services extension is no longer available.
rules.fix: Azure App Service on Azure Arc-enabled Kubernetes is retiring. Installation of the Application Services extension is no longer available.

ARM_Fix.details: Remove the Application Services extension resource from the ARM template. Redeploy hosted applications as Microsoft.App/containerApps resources targeting an Azure Container Apps environment.

TF_Fix.details: Remove the azurerm_arc_kubernetes_extension resource for Application Services from the Terraform configuration. Redeploy hosted applications as azurerm_container_app resources targeting an Azure Container Apps environment.
